fix.item: Fixed the form structure to remove the extra nested form and support a flat structure where articles can be listed multiple times.
Fixed incorrect language strings related to article counts and notifications.
Corrected the language string displayed in the view to properly show the number of articles found.
Fixed the array structure passed to the fix all articles function inside the model.
Moved the input value outside of the conditional statement in the template so the cancel button works even when no articles need fixing.
Properly implemented data binding to the form inside the model.
Properly implemented loading form data inside the view file.
Properly implemented the article count number display using the appropriate language string.
Updated the fix method to reduce structural duplication and normalize data into $validarticles.
Removed throw statements to avoid early exit when a single article update fails.
Used the model's setError method to accumulate error messages and allow the controller to enqueue them properly.

change.item: Removed unused getTable() and getItem() methods from the model.
Implemented proper data structuring inside loadFormData() using user state data.
Updated the toolbar authorization retrieval to follow the modern Joomla! approach.
Simplified the default view file by removing unnecessary constructors and global variables.
Switched to a flat table structure allowing articles to appear multiple times.
Moved normalized article logic from the controller into the model.
Separated processing logic into a protected method to remove duplication between updateAllArticles() and updateSingleArticle().
Updated the controller statement used to fetch the model.
Corrected configuration language strings to better describe malformed URL functionality.
Removed unnecessary global variables from the model and constructor.
Replaced manual checked out validation with the BaseDatabaseModel::isCheckedOut() method.
Removed the application global variable from the model and limited user state handling to only required statements.

note.item: This release focuses on structural cleanup, Joomla! modernisation, code optimization & bug fixes.

fix.item: Fixed an incorrect language string that used the wrong number of arguments.
Removed the version attribute from the manifest extension tag to align with Joomla! standards.

change.item: Added version information to the extension provider file.
Renamed the manifest file to avoid confusion with the form definition file.

note.item: This release improves manifest consistency and language string accuracy.

fix.item: Fixed unused language strings and optimized existing strings.
Updated the update server definition to better follow Joomla! extension update practices.

change.item: Changed the broken query string functionality into an option to scan malformed URLs.
Updated the controller to extend BaseController and the model to extend AdminModel.
Added language strings for the updated malformed URL scanning functionality.

note.item: This release modernizes the component structure and improves malformed URL detection.

add.item: Initial release of the Redirect Fixer component.
Added functionality to scan and repair malformed internal redirect URLs in Joomla! articles.
